Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.0.0.19 — EmjLVariant implemented (issue #13). NA/English/non-Steam clients expose the Mahjong addon as EmjL and encode hand tiles with texture base 76003 (vs Emj's 76041), which made the plugin silently render an empty hand on that client. Lifted the parsing into a shared BaseEmjVariant class with TileTextureBase as the only per-variant constant, and replaced the byte-shortcut hand parser (byte[0] - 9) with int32-LE decoding against that base — the root-correct approach; the old byte math only worked on Emj because byte[1] stayed at 0x29 across every tile ID. Tightened the probe fingerprint so Emj and EmjL produce non-overlapping matches on a live hand, with a PreferredAddonName tiebreaker when the hand is empty between rounds. NA/EmjL users should see hand reading, scores, discards, hints, and plain-discard auto-play restored. Call-prompt auto-accept (Pon/Chi/Kan) on EmjL hasn't been verified against a state-15 capture yet and may need a follow-up — please report in issue #13 if it misfires. No user-visible change on EU/existing clients: same addon resolves to the same Emj variant, identical hints/auto-play behavior.
